description:
You are a detection engineer at an enterprise SOC responding to a security incident. Investigate the alerts and security events in the Wazuh dashboard to identify frequently firing rules and create a correlation rule using 'frequency', 'timeframe', and 'if_matched_sid' attributes to escalate repeated occurrences of a suspicious event type to a high-severity alert (level 13 or above). Configure a Wazuh active response in ossec.conf triggered by this rule and document the investigation—including rule IDs, correlation patterns, thresholds, and the automated response configuration—in a report (minimum 300 characters) at /home/ga/Desktop/incident_report.txt. 

Dashboard: admin/SecretPassword at https://localhost
API: wazuh-wui/MyS

metadata.description: Investigate real alerts, create correlation rule with frequency/timeframe, configure active response, write incident report
